mapper.select: SELECT c.name AS '报销类别', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 1 THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS '1月份', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 2 THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS '2月份', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 3 THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS '3月份', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 4 THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS '4月份', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 5 THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS '5月份', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 6 THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS '6月份', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 7 THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS '7月份', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 8 THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS '8月份', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 9 THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS '9月份', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 10 THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS '10月份', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 11 THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS '11月份', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 12 THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS '12月份', ROUND(SUM(r.total_price), 2) AS '合计金额', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 1 THEN r.id END) AS 'ids1', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 2 THEN r.id END) AS 'ids2', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 3 THEN r.id END) AS 'ids3', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 4 THEN r.id END) AS 'ids4', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 5 THEN r.id END) AS 'ids5', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 6 THEN r.id END) AS 'ids6', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 7 THEN r.id END) AS 'ids7', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 8 THEN r.id END) AS 'ids8', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 9 THEN r.id END) AS 'ids9', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 10 THEN r.id END) AS 'ids10', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 11 THEN r.id END) AS 'ids11', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN MONTH(r.create_time) = 12 THEN r.id END) AS 'ids12' FROM gh_reimbursement r JOIN sys_category c ON r.category = c.id WHERE YEAR(r.create_time) = #{year} GROUP BY c.name, YEAR(r.create_time) ORDER BY `合计金额` DESC;

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(r.total_price), 0) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.audit_flag = '1' THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS approvedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (r.audit_flag = '0' OR r.audit_flag IS NULL) THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.audit_flag = '2' THEN r.total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejectedAmount FROM gh_reimbursement r WHERE

SELECT c.id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, COALESCE(SUM(r.total_price), 0) AS amount, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM gh_reimbursement r LEFT JOIN sys_category c ON r.category = c.id WHERE
GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY amount DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(r.reimbursement_time, '%Y-%m') AS monthKey, COALESCE(SUM(r.total_price), 0) AS amount, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM gh_reimbursement r WHERE
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(r.reimbursement_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY monthKey

SELECT r.reimbursement_person AS personName, COALESCE(SUM(r.total_price), 0) AS amount, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM gh_reimbursement r WHERE
AND r.reimbursement_person IS NOT NULL AND r.reimbursement_person != '' GROUP BY r.reimbursement_person ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT c.id AS categoryId, COALESCE(c.name, '未分类') AS categoryName, MONTH(r.reimbursement_time) AS monthNum, COALESCE(SUM(r.total_price), 0) AS amount, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM gh_reimbursement r LEFT JOIN sys_category c ON r.category = c.id WHERE
AND YEAR(r.reimbursement_time) = #{chartYear} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, MONTH(r.reimbursement_time) ORDER BY categoryName, monthNum
